description_long: This object is a standard Western-style toilet with a geometric, angular design. It features a prominent, rectangular cistern at the back, a rounded seat with a matching lid, and a faceted base that supports the bowl. The flush lever is visible on the left side of the cistern, and the overall surface is smooth and uniform in a light, off-white color. The toilet is floor-mounted, with the base extending directly to the ground, and the seat is clearly present atop the bowl. The design is utilitarian and typical for public or residential restrooms, with no visible accessibility modifications.
description: A floor-mounted, angular white toilet with a rectangular cistern, rounded seat, and visible flush lever.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full cistern, closed seat, and faceted base.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the flush lever and the profile of the seat and cistern.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the cistern and the straight alignment of the base.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the seat profile and the absence of a flush lever on this side.
